GET /activities/card-deliveries:
# GET /activities/card-deliveries

List all digital member card delivery activities

## Base URLs

- Local: `http://api.community-management.test/api`
- Staging: `https://api.communitymanagement.xyz/api`
- Prod: `https://api.getcommunal.com/api`

## Parameters

- `filter[member_id]` (query) - Filter activities by the member ID belonging to the related user. Accepts alphanumeric strings.
- `filter[request_hash]` (query) - Filter activities by the unique request hash for tracing API requests.
- `filter[date_from]` (query) - Return activities created on or after the provided date. Format: ISO 8601 date/datetime (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS).
- `filter[date_to]` (query) - Return activities created on or before the provided date. Format: ISO 8601 date/datetime (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS).
- `filter[status]` (query) - Filter activities by delivery status. Supported values: `success`, `failed`.

## Responses

- `200`: 
- `401`:

POST /membership_cards/send:
# POST /membership_cards/send

Send a membership card for a user
Sends a membership card via the email on file for the user. This method allows
configuration of which card types to send.

This endpoint can also be used to create
and update user specific data that will be used to generate the card. If an email supplied
is not found, a new user will be created with the additional data supplied.

## Base URLs

- Local: `http://api.community-management.test/api`
- Staging: `https://api.communitymanagement.xyz/api`
- Prod: `https://api.getcommunal.com/api`

## Request Body

Content-Type: `application/json`

## Responses

- `200`: 
- `401`: 
- `403`: 
- `422`: 
- `500`:

excluded by default for performance - use `?include=programs` to include them.

- `401`:

# GET /parent_programs/{parent_program}

Get a program
Returns detailed information about a specific program including
all configuration fields. Use `?include=programs` to include registration
opportunities (sessions) with pricing information.

## Base URLs

- Local: `http://api.community-management.test/api`
- Staging: `https://api.communitymanagement.xyz/api`
- Prod: `https://api.getcommunal.com/api`

## Parameters

- `parent_program` (path) **(required)**

## Responses

- `200`: `ParentProgramResource`
- `401`:
GET /program_signups:
# GET /program_signups

List program signups

## Base URLs

- Local: `http://api.community-management.test/api`
- Staging: `https://api.communitymanagement.xyz/api`
- Prod: `https://api.getcommunal.com/api`

## Parameters

- `filter[program_id]` (query) - Filter by program ID. Supports comma-separated values for multiple programs.
- `filter[program[parent_program_id]]` (query) - Filter by parent program ID. Returns signups for all child programs under this parent.
- `filter[user_id]` (query) - Filter by user ID. Non-managers can only filter to their own ID.
- `filter[query]` (query) - Search by program name, user name, user email, guest name, additional member name, or guest email.
- `filter[status]` (query) - Filter by program time status. Supports multiple comma-separated values. Options: ongoing, upcoming, past.
- `filter[timeScope]` (query) - Simple time scope filter. Options: upcoming (includes ongoing and active), past, all.
- `filter[event_start_date]` (query) - Filter by program event date range. Pass as array: filter[event_start_date][0]=start&filter[event_start_date][1]=end. Includes ongoing programs.
- `filter[upcoming]` (query) - Filter to signups for upcoming programs only.
- `filter[past]` (query) - Filter to signups for past programs only.
- `filter[ongoing]` (query) - Filter to signups for ongoing programs only.
- `filter[withTrashed]` (query) - Include soft-deleted signups. Defaults to excluding deleted.
- `filter[program[archived_at]]` (query) - Filter by program archived status. Pass empty string to exclude archived programs.
- `filter[program[deleted_at]]` (query) - Filter by program deleted status. Pass empty string to exclude deleted programs.
- `include` (query) - Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: additionalMember, additionalMember.emergency, files, guest, program, program.parentProgram, transaction, user, user.family, user.family.emergency, formSubmissions, subscriptionSchedule.config.configurable, subscriptionSchedule.paymentsReceived, attendanceRecords.

## Responses

- `200`: 
- `401`:

Get a program signup

- Staging: `https://api.communitymanagement.xyz/api`

- `include` (query) - Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: additionalMember, additionalMember.emergency, files, guest, program, program.parentProgram, transaction, user, user.family, user.family.emergency, formSubmissions, subscriptionSchedule.config.configurable, subscriptionSchedule.paymentsReceived, attendanceRecords.

## Responses

- `200`: `ProgramSignupResource`
- `401`:
GET /programs:
# GET /programs

List registration opportunities
Returns a paginated list of registration opportunities (programs) with optional filtering.

## Base URLs

- Local: `http://api.community-management.test/api`
- Staging: `https://api.communitymanagement.xyz/api`
- Prod: `https://api.getcommunal.com/api`

## Parameters

- `filter[parent_program_id]` (query) - Filter by parent program ID.
- `filter[status]` (query) - Filter by status. Supports multiple comma-separated values. Options: active, upcoming, past, ongoing, archived.
- `filter[query]` (query) - Search programs by name (partial match).
- `filter[with_participants]` (query) - Filter to only programs that have participants.
- `filter[can_register]` (query) - Filter to only programs the authenticated user can register for.
- `filter[upcoming]` (query) - Filter to only upcoming programs.
- `filter[past]` (query) - Filter to only past programs.
- `filter[archived_at]` (query) - Filter by archived status. Pass empty string to exclude archived programs.
- `filter[deleted_at]` (query) - Filter by deleted status. Pass empty string to exclude deleted programs.
- `include` (query) - Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: signups, parentProgram, waitlistSignups, attendanceSheets.
- `append` (query) - Append computed attributes (comma-separated). Options: audience, signup_count.
- `sort` (query) - Sort results by field. Prefix with - for descending. Options: id, registration_start_date, registration_end_date, event_start_date, event_end_date, created_at.

## Responses

- `200`: 
- `401`:
GET /programs/{program}:
# GET /programs/{program}

Get a registration opportunity

## Base URLs

- Local: `http://api.community-management.test/api`
- Staging: `https://api.communitymanagement.xyz/api`
- Prod: `https://api.getcommunal.com/api`

## Parameters

- `program` (path) **(required)**
- `include` (query) - Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: metadata, prices, prices.membership, prices.plan, prices.schedule_config, signups, parentProgram, waitlistSignups, attendanceSheets.
- `append` (query) - Append computed attributes (comma-separated). Options: signup_count.

## Responses

- `200`: `RegistrationOpportunity`
- `401`:
